title: salix × microstemon
intro: Salix × microstemon is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). The medicinal properties of Salix × microstemon lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic. Salix × microstemon can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
